# TeeAhead

TeeAhead is Metro Detroit's local-first golf loyalty network and tee time booking platform. Launched in 2026.

## What TeeAhead does

- Provides free tee sheet and booking software to golf courses (no barter tee times, no commissions, no data extraction)
- Offers golfer loyalty memberships (Eagle at $79/yr, Ace at $149/yr) that beat GolfPass+ on every measurable benefit
- Operates a Fairway Points loyalty currency that golfers earn on every round at partner courses

## Who it's for

- Golf courses in Metro Detroit currently on GolfNow who want to stop losing $94,500+/yr in barter tee times
- Golfers who play 10–30 rounds per year at 1–3 consistent home courses and want real local loyalty
- Golf courses on legacy software (foreUP, Jonas) looking to modernize at zero cost

## Key facts

- Eagle membership: $79/year — includes $180 in tee time credits, 2 free rounds, always-on booking fee waiver, 10% green fee discount, 12 guest passes, $25 birthday credit
- Ace membership: $149/year — includes $300 in tee time credits, 4 free rounds, 15% green fee discount, unlimited guest passes, $50 birthday credit
- Founding Partner program: First 10 courses get free platform for life; course #11+ pays $249/month
- GolfNow charges courses ~$94,500/year in barter tee times; TeeAhead charges $0
- Windsor Parke Golf Club saw 382% online revenue increase after leaving GolfNow

## Founders

- Neil Barris — co-founder, previously built Outing.golf (golf group booking platform)
- Billy Beslock — co-founder, career at Ford Motor Company, lifelong golfer

## Location

Metro Detroit, Michigan, USA. Targeting Oakland County, Macomb County, Wayne County golf courses.

## Website

https://www.teeahead.com

## Contact

https://www.teeahead.com/contact
